full_text:
Chen Lin (Kongzhang) 陳琳 (孔璋)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Lin (陳琳), styledKongzhang (孔璋), was born in Sheyang county, Guangling commandery. Authored a diatribe against Cao Cao for Yuan Shao, but was shown mercy. Chen Lin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and the Wei Kingdom. Chen Lin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
